name: Inclusion of Web Functionality from an Untrusted Source
description: The product includes web functionality such as third-party JavaScript widgets from external domains, granting that untrusted code full access within the product's domain including cookies, DOM data, and user session information.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL[web_page] includes EXTERNAL[third_party_script] from an untrusted domain that executes within the same origin as the application, without CONTROL[content_security_policy] or CONTROL[subresource_integrity] restricting the external code's capabilities
